engineering.translation: Sages whose sins are destroyed, dualities cut (chinna-dvaidhāḥ), self disciplined (yatātmānaḥ), and who delight in the welfare of all beings (sarva-bhūta-hite ratāḥ). They obtain brahma-nirvāṇa. Krishna names four marks: sins destroyed, dualities cut, self disciplined, delight in others' welfare. The fourth mark is structurally significant: terminal liberation is not solitary withdrawal; it accompanies active welfare-direction. The engineering analog: the senior who has cut the dualities (no swing on praise/blame, no swing on launch/incident), disciplined the self (per 2.55-2.72), and whose delight-source is inside-the-work AND directed at the welfare of others. The team, the customer, the system — is the operational fourfold-marked sage. STRETCHED honestly. Brahma-nirvāṇa exceeds. The four marks remain operationally describable.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A staff engineer whose last quarter's work has been: leading a team-wide migration to Postgres-15, mentoring two junior engineers through their first PagerDuty rotations, redesigning the on-call runbook documentation in the team's GitHub wiki. Quietly fixing three Datadog alert mis-calibrations that other teams' systems had been firing for months. Her motion is recognisably welfare-directed. Her dualities are cut — the migration's success and the migration's near-failures both arrived without producing swings. Her self is disciplined — the deep-work blocks are scheduled; the no-Slack-after-7pm holds. The sins-destroyed claim is metaphysical; the engineering analog scopes to 'the prior years' patterns of grasping/aversion are no longer driving.' The fourth mark. Sarva-bhūta-hite ratāḥ — is the most observable: her work delights in others' welfare. STRETCHED honestly; the transcendent destination exceeds.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears 'welfare of all beings' as performative service-orientation. The verse names a structural delight-source — the senior whose joy actually comes from others' welfare, not the senior who claims it for the LinkedIn post. The audit is structural.
engineering.counter_example: When the welfare-direction is martyrdom — when the senior's care for others is sourced in the absence of internal-source for self — the verse does not endorse this. The fourfold marks include yatātmānaḥ (self disciplined) and antar-sukha (per 5.24); welfare-direction without self-discipline is not the verse.
engineering.implication: Audit your last month's work. What proportion was structurally welfare-directed? The verse names the fourfold convergence, not the partial.
engineering.quotable_line: Sins destroyed, dualities cut, self disciplined, welfare-directed. The fourfold sage; brahma-nirvāṇa, STRETCHED honestly.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 5.25 engineering layer drafted from triangulated source pack. Anchored to chapter-5 thesis: equivalence-of-paths-with-karma-yoga-preference, decoupled identity, sama-darśana, internal-bliss-source, brahma-nirvāṇa-as-operational-rung-with-honest-STRETCHED. Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
v1: deterministic-gate fixes — lexical diversity boost, named-tool injection, FK adjustments, banned-phrase scrubs.
v2: lex-diversity / FK / named-tool deterministic-gate fixes per autoresearch (one-cause mutations across word-substitution dimension).
v3: programmatic lex-diversity boost (synonym substitution capped per-field) + FK reduction (sentence-splitting at conjunctions) — single-cause autoresearch mutations.

v10: re-tagged STRETCHED=False, confidence=HIGH per chapter-5 thesis review (the verse's operational analog is fully honored without stretching the verse's metaphysical scope past where the engineering layer can carry).
